info.name: Auraxis API - Canonical E2E and Smoke
info.description: Canonical black-box suite for Auraxis API. Organized by domain, validated by Newman in CI, and designed for direct Postman import. Privileged flows are optional and gated by adminToken + enablePrivilegedFlows.
